title: How to Play the Housing Market Slowdown
text: Prospective homebuyers and investors alike have been watching the U.S. housing market's meteoric rise over the past couple of years, with homebuyers hoping price increases would cool off soon and investors rejoicing in the opposite.

title: No love for homebuilder stocks at the Bank of America
text: Homebuilder stocks are still down about 25% for the year but a Bank of America analyst says the macro environment warrants keeping away. BofA downgrades three homebuilder stocks On Thursday, Rafe Jadrosich downgraded three stocks to “underperform” that speaks to his overall outlook on this space.

title: Surging mortgage rates spur downgrade of homebuilder stocks by Bank of America as the US housing market slows
text: Affordability of new homes is declining, with the average monthly mortgage payment up as much as 50% in some markets in the last six months.

title: Homebuilder stocks drop as companies report 8th straight monthly drop in housing sentiment to the lowest reading since start of the pandemic
text: About 1-in-5 homebuilders reported reducing prices to boost sales or limit cancellations, according to the NAHB/Wells Fargo survey.

title: 4 Stocks That Look Like Bargains
text: As of Friday, Aug. 12, the following stocks look undervalued by the market as their price-earnings ratios without non-recurring items trade below 20 while their price-earnings to growth (PEG) ratios trade near or below 1.
